creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Romain,

For a user (email address) to be used in Assignee, CC and other fields, an account needs to exist with that email address, for obvious reasons (cant spam any email arbitrarily)

While anyone, including members of the puppet team can create accounts, I have gone ahead and created the account (with a random password) so that it can be used in these fields.

Please close this issue (FIXED) once confirmed, or let me know if anything else is required.
